understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` for each level (starting with BP35), avoiding spikes (`u`/`v`) since landing on them immediately ends the attempt, and continue completing levels until the game is won within the attempt/turn limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only), after which gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid/support tile, hits a hazard, or reaches the goal. CLICK targets a specific grid position [x,y] to interact with clickable tiles (notably removing breakable `x` blocks) without moving the player; this can open new fall paths. UNDO reverts the previous action. Spikes cause immediate failure on landing. Each level allows 2 attempts with up to 50 turns per attempt, so efficient moves and using clicks to create passages are important.
